_comment: RAG vector store configuration for the study-agent knowledge extractor.
_setup_note: Set 'enabled' to true and choose your backend after installing the required packages.

chroma._comment: Local Chroma DB — zero-setup, good for personal knowledge bases.
chroma._embedding_note: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 is fast and good enough for personal use. For better quality use 'all-mpnet-base-v2' (slower, larger).

weaviate._comment: Weaviate — better for team knowledge bases or larger corpora.
weaviate._not_yet_implemented: Add WeaviateBackend class to knowledge_extractor.py to use this.
weaviate._vectorizer_note: Use 'text2vec-transformers' for a fully local setup.

pgvector._comment: pgvector — use if you already have PostgreSQL running.
pgvector._not_yet_implemented: Add PgVectorBackend class to knowledge_extractor.py to use this.
pgvector._dimension_note: 384 for all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Adjust to match your embedding model.

search_settings._threshold_note: Documents with similarity below this threshold are excluded from results. Adjust based on your embedding model and content diversity.

indexing_settings._batch_note: Number of documents to index in a single batch. Larger = faster but uses more memory.
